ogTitle: Bahrs Scrub vs Bajool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bahrs Scrub and Bajool.
heading: Bahrs Scrub vs Bajool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bahrs Scrub, Queensland and Bajool, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bajool has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Bahrs Scrub (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bahrs Scrub or Bajool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bahrs Scrub has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Bajool scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bahrs Scrub scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Bajool scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bahrs Scrub or Bajool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bajool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
